Rat: House of Construction  new beginnings, births and new concepts are auspicious
Ox: House of Construction growth is favored which leads to projects bearing fruit and harvesting crops as well as profits
Tiger: House of Expansion     expansion through aggression and conflict in the world
Rabbit: House of Expansion (increase in size, quantity, or scope; to spread out or unfold) through diplomacy and talks usually to repair the damage caused by the Tiger's aggression
Dragon: House of Mystery-exotic things and karma are favored, good and bad karma will be handed out.
Snake: House of Mystery-contemplation and secrets are auspicious.
Horse: House of Gender-showcase the characteristics of males (independence, practical, not oversensitive, ?  breadwinner, forceful, dominant, aggressive, stubborn) both good and bad.
Sheep: House of Gender-Sheep female gender is favored showing off the year's feminine qualities (peace, comfortable home, passive  nurturing, supportive, sensitivity, willing to compromise, empathetic, vain, easily hurt, over protective).
Monkey: House of Career - advancements are made through merit, effort, skill, and technology
Rooster: House of Career - advancements are made through ambition, self-promotion, networking and flair
Dog: House of Family - anything that has to do with loyalty, support and protection and providing for one's family are favored
Pig: House of Family - children and comforts are favored
